translated: Actually,
the request for the new song for the Fan Festa has been withdrawn.
Please, don't be alarmed.
It wasn't due to any fault on our part.
The representative just contacted me.
It seems they heard back from the creator who was ill.
So you mean the person who was originally in charge of the song?
Yes.
They said they'll be able to finish all three songs as planned, and they were very apologetic.
It sounded like they were ready to prostrate themselves over the phone.
I see.
But I'm glad they're feeling better.
It is a bit disappointing that the offer fell through, though.
True.
However, we actually received a new request.
A new one?
The rep said they'd love to have Leo/need perform in the 'Freshman Slot' at the next Fan Festa.
It's partly to make up for this time.
It's a bit further out, but I think we should consider it positively.
Since it's in the future, there shouldn't be any scheduling issues.
I understand.
I'll talk to the rest of the members about it.
Please do.
There's no rush, so feel free to take your time deciding.
I'm truly sorry for causing so much confusion in the end.
This is so realistic.
I think it couldn't be helped.
Besides, I'm glad we found out before we officially accepted.
I'm relieved to hear you say that.
I'll do my best to support you so you can focus on the one-man live and the new songs.
We're counting on you.
That's good.
Right now, I...
Well then, I'll leave contacting the other members to you.
I'll get in touch with the staff for the one-man live.
I want to proceed with the setlist that includes the new song.
I'll let them know.
Thank you very much.
I'll be going now.
I feel so relieved right now.
Yeah.
I'm just so relieved.
I thought I had to make a choice, that I had to pick one over the other, but now that I don't have to...
I'm just glad.
I'm relieved.
She's so admirable.
Truly admirable.
But...
This isn't good.
This time I happened to avoid it, but there will surely be times in the future when I have to choose.
Times when I'll have to make a decision where there is no right answer.
That's why...
I need to become someone who can make those choices.
So that I can lead everyone.
She's leading herself.
As the leader of Leo/need.
And that was Episode 8.
Personally, the scene that caught my attention...
The part that left an impression was when Honami-chan said she would definitely choose...
She seemed a bit down, but...
The scene where she resolves to lead everyone as their leader was really moving.
If it were me, I'd probably be more optimistic, like 'Oh, wow!'
That's how I'd feel.
I've never had a job like being a leader before, so...
I wonder about that part.
How should I put it?
